name: @openmate/mcp-extension
description: OpenMate MCP browser extension — bridges the OpenMate MCP server to your existing Chrome session.

scripts.build: tsc --project . && tsc --project tsconfig.ui.json && vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.mts && vite build --config vite.sw.config.mts
scripts.watch: tsc --watch --project . & tsc --watch --project tsconfig.ui.json & vite build --watch & vite build --watch --config vite.content.config.mts & vite build --watch --config vite.sw.config.mts
